---
title: "2 and 3 factor decomposition"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, assets/mystyle.scss]
    footer: "[Workshop Home](./index.html)"
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    callout-appearance: simple
    code-line-numbers: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-annotations: hover
    code-copy: hover
    chalkboard: true
---


# 2 factor decomposition

## data

## crude rate

## pop A standardised to pop B

## pop B standardised to pop A

## diff in crude is not diff in std

## the interaction term

## rearrange to... 

## pops standardised to avg

# 3 factor decomposition  

## data

## crude rate

## pop A standardised to pop B

## pop B standardised to pop A

## uh-oh.. the interaction termS

# Das Gupta

## combinatorics

## 2 factor

## 3 factor

## ... 5 factor









# End
